name: Hammer Penguins
short_description: Hammer Penguins is a cute tile-matching game where the goal is to clear the board by selecting matching tiles.
detailed_description:
Penn and Gwynne (a pair of playful penguins) are off to save their animal friends who have been trapped in ice. Help them use their mighty hammers to smash the ice and set their friends free!

Hammer Penguins is a cute tile-matching game where the goal is to clear the board by selecting matching tiles. Select matching tiles to have the Hammer Penguins smash the ice and free their friends.

Matching tiles show the same animal and a line can be drawn from 1 to the other without making more than 2 turns or passing through another occupied tile. They can only be selected if there is an empty tile next to them.


Try your luck on 4 different difficulty levels, as well as the (not-so-secret) Cow Level!

10% of all profits will go to the Greeneville - Greene County Humane Society

Don't you want to save this cute little badger and his friends?
